missing_frameguard.description: Missing X-Frame-Options and CSP frame-ancestors — page can be framed for clickjacking attacks on state-changing actions

probes.description: Check for X-Frame-Options and CSP frame-ancestors headers on state-changing pages (settings, password change, delete, transfer)

frameable_state_change.description: Frameable pages with state-changing forms — CSRF token present but page frameable allows clickjacking to trigger the action

probes.description: Page with CSRF-protected form but no frame protection — clickjacking bypasses CSRF defense since the real form is rendered

double_frame_bypass.description: Frame-busting JavaScript bypass — page uses JS frame-busting instead of headers, which can be defeated with sandbox attribute

probes.description: JS frame-busting (top !== self) without X-Frame-Options header — bypassable with iframe sandbox='allow-forms allow-scripts'
